creator: bminish@gmail.com
text:
The irish mirror site at 
http://www.ie.freebsd.org/
Is terribly out of date and shows 6.2 as latest current release 
news from 2007 etc 

Can someone let the relevant maintainers know so that it can be fixed 

Kind regards 
Brendan

How-To-Repeat: Go to http://www.ie.freebsd.org/
